title: Fresh Italian Ricotta Salad
description: A chilled, comforting Italian salad that blends creamy ricotta with crisp veggies, pickles, and a buttery lemon dressing—diabetic-friendly and refreshingly fresh.
instructions: In a large bowl combine ricotta, mozzarella, cucumber, tomatoes, pickles, basil, and oregano.
Whisk together olive oil, softened butter, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to form a smooth dressing.
Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients and gently toss until everything is evenly coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed—add a pinch more salt or pepper.
Transfer the salad to the refrigerator and chill for at least 15 minutes to meld the flavors.
Serve cold, optionally garnished with a few extra basil leaves or a light drizzle of olive oil.
Enjoy as a light lunch or a refreshing side dish.
